---
name: Feature request / 功能建议
about: Suggest an idea or improvement / 提出想法或改进建议
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary / 摘要

<!-- One sentence describing the feature. / 一句话描述该功能。 -->

## Problem it solves / 解决的问题

<!-- What problem does this feature address? / 该功能解决了什么问题？ -->

## Proposed solution / 建议方案

<!-- How would you like it to work? / 你希望它如何工作？ -->

## Alternatives considered / 考虑过的替代方案

<!-- Any alternative approaches you've thought about. / 你考虑过的其他方案。 -->

## Additional context / 其他背景

<!-- Anything else that helps understand the request. / 帮助理解需求的其他背景信息。 -->
